name: Tuan Sing Holdings Limited
summary: Tuan Sing Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment, hotels investment, and industrial services businesses in Singapore, Australia, China, Malaysia, and Indonesia. The company's Property segment develops and invests in residential, commercial, and industrial properties; and provides property management services. Its Hotels Investment segment owns two five-star hotels managed by Hyatt International in Melbourne and Perth, Australia. The company's Industrial Services segment trades in and markets various industrial commodities, including coal, rubber, and aluminum; and manufactures and markets polypropylene woven bags. Its Other Investments segment manufactures and sells printed circuit boards for customers in the automotive, computer peripheral, consumer electronics, telecommunication, healthcare, and instrument and control sectors; and retails golf-related lifestyle products, as well as deals in footwear. The company was formerly known as Hytex Limited and changed its name to Tuan Sing Holdings Limited in 1983. Tuan Sing Holdings Limited was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Singapore.
